items.title: Stocks Edge Down Ahead Of Key Inflation Reports, Crude Hits 5-Month High, Bitcoin Sinks: What's Driving Markets Monday?
items.author: Piero Cingari
items.description: Stocks edged down as traders remained cautious ahead of key inflation reports and the start of bank earnings season. Bitcoin dropped 3% to a two-month low, while oil prices surged and Treasury yields climbed.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's stock rallied 3.9% as energy stocks outperformed.
The crypto stock dropped nearly 4% as Bitcoin prices declined.
The health insurance company's stock jumped 6.9% on a government proposal to increase payments for Medicare Advantage plans.
The health insurance company's stock rose 7.8% on the same government proposal.
The company's stock gained 3.5% as energy stocks rallied.
The crypto-linked stock slid more than 3% as Bitcoin prices declined.
The company's stock plummeted 20% after projecting lower-than-expected 2025 revenue and announcing cost-cutting measures.
The AI chipmaker's stock dropped 2.7% as it urged the Biden administration to oppose regulations on AI technology.
The company's stock gained 5% as energy stocks rallied.
The health insurance company's stock rose 4.8% on the same government proposal that lifted other players in the sector.
